title: Intuitive Surgical Software Engineering Co-op Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your Intuitive Surgical Software Engineering Co-op interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your Durham, NC internship.
content:
# Intuitive Surgical Software Engineering Co-op Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Intuitive Surgical Software Engineering Co-op internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Durham, NC
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Intuitive Surgical
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Intuitive Surgical is offering a Software Engineering Co-op internship position in Durham, NC. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Intuitive Surgical's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Intuitive Surgical interview and increase your chances of success.
